nodes.label: Lit Remake: General Overview (docs/lit-remake/00-genel-bakis.md)
Problem: Three Paradigms Running Simultaneously (Vanilla CE, Partial Lit, Real Lit)
Problem: ShellController 992-Line God Class
Critical: Worker IPC Promises Have No Timeout (Memory Leak)
Critical: Preload Signal Fires Even on Error (nuxy:ready)
Critical: Lit Render Cycle vs Manual DOM Sync Clash (queueMicrotask vs updateComplete)
Problem: packages/ui Stub Layer is Practically Dead Code
Problem: ceListItem/ceList/h() — Manually Reinventing JSX
Lit Remake: Shell Extension Analysis (01-shell.md)
Problem: nuxy-shell-view.ts Extends HTMLElement, Not LitElement
Problem: Shell View render() 154-Line Monolith
Anti-Pattern: shell-dom.ts — Imperative DOM Factory (Should be Lit Templates)
Bug: nuxy-shell-omni-bar.ts MutationObserver Infinite Loop
Security: nuxy-shell-omni-bar.ts innerHTML SVG Binding — XSS Risk
Problem: ShellController 19-Field God State Object
Problem: bindGlobalKeyboard() 167-Line Method
Accessibility: nuxy-command-palette.ts No Focus Trap or role=dialog
Type Safety: ListItem Not a Discriminated Union
Test Issue: pressOmnibarKey Workaround Concealed Real Bug
Lit Remake: UI Components Analysis (02-ui-components.md)
Problem: Shadow DOM vs Light DOM Inconsistency Across All Components
Problem: Layout-Only Components as Unnecessary Custom Elements (NuxyBadge, NuxyCard, etc.)
Problem: syncHostClasses() Repeated in Every Component
Problem: SelectBox 210+ Lines Monolith — Multiple Responsibilities
Bug: SelectBox document.body.appendChild (Portal Anti-Pattern)
Bug: Modal reparentSlots() Imperative DOM Instead of Named Slots
Problem: parseOptions() / parseNum() Duplicated Across 4+ Components
Bug: Arrow Function Event Listeners Risk Memory Leak
Security: Text/Heading unsafeHTML Dynamic Tag — XSS Risk
Accessibility: ARIA Missing from Interactive Components (Checkbox, RadioGroup, Tooltip)
Lit Remake: Packages/Core Analysis (03-packages-core.md)
Problem: IPC Messages Have No Discriminator Field (kind/type)
Critical: host:call Promise Map Has No Timeout — Memory Leak
Problem: packages/ui Stubs Are Dead Code (window.UI Pattern Unused)
Problem: Extension-SDK CoreContext Proxy — Generic Error Messages
Problem: core.extensions.invoke Circular Call Deadlock Risk
Problem: Worker Startup Failure Logged But Not Marked Failed in Registry
Anti-Pattern: ce-utils.ts h() — Hand-Written JSX Alternative (to Be Removed in Rewrite)
Bug: two-panel-nav.ts Uses document.querySelectorAll Crossing Component Boundaries
Lit Remake: Bundled Extensions Analysis (04-extensions.md)
Notes Extension: Generally Clean Pattern
Problem: EXT_ID Hard-Coded in All Extensions (Should Come from extensionId Setter)
Bug: nyaa Extension .catch(() => {}) Silent Error Swallowing
Bug: nyaa Extension No AbortController — Parallel Fetch Accumulation
Bug: settings Backend Handler Missing await on storage.get (Returns Promise Unresolved)
Bug: settings State Race Condition — UI Updates Before Backend Confirmation
Security: calculator Extension Uses eval() — Expression Injection Risk
Waste: calculator Has Empty Backend Worker Thread (No Backend Logic)
Bug: All Extensions Access window.core Without Null Check
Lit Remake: Electron & Renderer Analysis (05-electron-renderer.md)
Problem: Bootstrap Sequence Race — Extensions Spawn After Window Opens
Problem: ipc/register.ts 600+ Line Monolith — All Handlers in One File
Problem: extensions/scanner.ts 612 Lines — Too Many Responsibilities
Bug: Scanner Accepts Manifests with Missing Required Fields (id can be undefined)
Bug: preload.ts Dispatches nuxy:ready Even When contextBridge.exposeInMainWorld Fails
Bug: renderer/bootstrap.ts Chain Has No Error Propagation (loadUiKit fail continues)
Security: nuxy-ext:// Protocol No ext-id Validation — Directory Traversal Risk
Critical: Worker Threads Have No Timeout — Zombie Workers on Hang
Problem: worker.on('error') Only Logs — Extension Not Marked Failed
Lit Rewrite Plan (06-yeniden-yazirim-plani.md)
Rewrite Phase 1: Infrastructure — IPC Discriminator, Preload Signal, Protocol Sanitization, Scanner Split
Rewrite Phase 2: Shell Extension — ShellController Split into ReactiveControllers, NuxyShellViewElement → LitElement
Proposed: QueryController — Lit ReactiveController for Query State
Proposed: NavigationController — Lit ReactiveController for selectedIndex/keyboard
Rewrite Phase 3: UI Component Library — Shadow DOM, Shared Utils, ARIA Checklist
Proposed SelectBox Split: nuxy-select-box + nuxy-select-dropdown + nuxy-select-option
Proposed Shared Utils: parse.ts, mirror-attrs.ts, host-classes.ts, focus-trap.ts, keyboard-nav.ts
Rewrite Phase 4: Extension Fixes — eval() removal, AbortController, async await fixes
Proposed: scanner.ts Split into 5 Modules (manifest-loader, worker-manager, theme-registrar, icon-registrar, dev-sync)
Core Decisions: Lit + Shadow DOM, Static Styles, Remove h()/packages/ui/ce-utils, EXT_ID from manifest

hyperedges.label: Lit Remake: Three-Paradigm Codebase Problem (Vanilla CE + Partial Lit + Real Lit)
IPC/Worker Timeout & Memory Leak Cluster (No Timeout → Zombie Workers)
Security-Critical Issues Requiring Fix: Path Traversal, eval(), innerHTML XSS
